properties.expressionToBeApplied: (CASE WHEN (CONTAINS((coalesce(LOWER(CAST((TO_DATE(column_value, 'YYYY-MM-DD')) AS VARCHAR CHARACTER SET "UTF-8")), '')), LOWER('-'))) THEN (TO_DATE(column_value, 'YYYY-MM-DD')) ELSE (TO_TIMESTAMP((REGEXP_REPLACE((TO_DATE(column_value, 'YYYY-MM-DD')), '\\.\\d+', '')), 'MM/DD/YY')) END)

expression.expression: (CASE WHEN (PREPARER IS NULL) THEN 1 ELSE 0 END)
(CASE WHEN ("PREPARER DATE" IS NULL) THEN 1 ELSE 0 END)
(CASE WHEN (REVIEWER IS NULL) THEN 1 ELSE 0 END)
(CASE WHEN ("REVIEWER DATE" IS NULL) THEN 1 ELSE 0 END)
(CASE WHEN (("KEY CONTROLQUESMARK" = 'Yes') AND (MANAGERQUESMARK = 'No')) THEN 1 ELSE 0 END)

expressions.alias: "NON-MANAGER REVIEWER SIGNED OFF ON A KEY CONTROL"

expression.expression: CAST((CASE WHEN ((DATEADD('day', CAST(5 AS INTEGER), "PREPARER DATE")) < "REVIEWER DATE") THEN 1 ELSE 0 END) AS INTEGER)
(CASE WHEN ("REVIEWER DATE" < "PREPARER DATE") THEN 1 ELSE 0 END)

* EXCLUDE("MISSING PREPARER SIGN OFF", "PREPARER CAN'T BE REVIEWER", "MISSING REVIEWER SIGN OFF DATE", "NON-MANAGER REVIEWER SIGNED OFF ON A KEY CONTROL", "MISSING REVIEWER SIGN OFF", "MISSING PREPARER SIGN OFF DATE", "REVIEWER SIGNED OFF BEFORE THE PREPARER", "REVIEWER SIGNED OFF AFTER 5 DAYS")
count(CASE WHEN (isnull(VALUE) OR (CAST(VALUE AS STRING) = '')) THEN NULL ELSE 1 END)

((((((("MISSING PREPARER SIGN OFF" + "MISSING PREPARER SIGN OFF DATE") + "MISSING REVIEWER SIGN OFF") + "MISSING REVIEWER SIGN OFF DATE") + "NON-MANAGER REVIEWER SIGNED OFF ON A KEY CONTROL") + "PREPARER CAN'T BE REVIEWER") + "REVIEWER SIGNED OFF AFTER 5 DAYS") + "REVIEWER SIGNED OFF BEFORE THE PREPARER")
(CASE WHEN ("AT FAULT" = 'Preparer') THEN PREPARER ELSE REVIEWER END)
CAST("EMPLOYEE WITH THE ISSUE" AS STRING)
